'''Aguarl 3''', or '''Aguarl III''', was a [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Aguarl system/Legends|Aguarl system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==History==
With the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] pledged support to the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], but peace was not to last on Aguarl. After the first Imperial attack on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], a number of [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] Rebels established a base on the world. [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] was preparing to leave ''[[Kalla's Stanchion]]'' to visit Aguarl 3 to meet with Prime Minister [[Yenley]] approximately six months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], but was delayed by a sighting of Imperial forces which forced the rebels to scatter their [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] temporarily.

Later the same month, Organa was inspecting the Rebel base on the planet when a Quarren spy betrayed its location to the Empire. Four [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] from the ''[[Ravagor]]'' [[Battle of Aguarl 3|attacked]] the planet, but only one survived the defense system, piloted by [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]]. Trommer's concussion missiles necessitated the evacuation of the Rebel base.
